problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Psychedelic-induced. Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
